Ntc Of Mtn & Mtn To Vacate Previously Imposed Sanctions, Calendar Motion: Motion, Calendar Motion: Vacate, Calendar Motion: Sanctions
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff's Motion to vacate sanctions issued 1/8/01 to Richard J. Staskus, Esq., $350.00 is scheduled today.
There being no appearance or an objection the tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted.
Sanctions imposed are ordered vacated. Moving party to submit a proposed order within five days. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon. (212)
